source_pr.title: store/tikv: forward requests by BatchCommands
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: youjiali1995 <zlwgx1023@gmail.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:

Support forwarding requests by `BatchCommands`. Based on https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/23362.

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:

Create a `BatchCommands` for each forwarded host in a single connection.

How it Works:

### Related changes

* Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: Flaky request-forwarding tests due to races between background recv/forward loops and test-controlled liveness/failpoint state
failure_signature: race in request forwarding / recv loops (forwarded host) leading to intermittent failures
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to races between concurrent request-forwarding recv loops and test-controlled state. The tests relied on unsynchronized shared state for mocked store liveness / forwarding behavior, and also used a very short sleep window that could be insufficient for background loops to observe state changes. This PR stabilizes it by making the mocked liveness state concurrency-safe (using atomic load) and by increasing the sleep delay to reduce timing sensitivity in the forwarding error path.
fix_pattern: Make request-forwarding test state thread-safe (atomic/mock knobs) and reduce timing sensitivity (avoid too-short sleeps) in recv/forward loops.

evidence: evidence: fix race in request forwarding

files: go.sum, store/tikv/client.go, store/tikv/client_batch.go, store/tikv/client_fail_test.go, store/tikv/client_test.go, store/tikv/config/config.go, store/tikv/mock_tikv_service_test.go, store/tikv/region_cache.go, store/tikv/region_cache_test.go, store/tikv/region_request_test.go, store/tikv/tikvrpc/tikvrpc.go
